scripts.format: pnpm run format:prettier; pnpm run format:biome
scripts.db:push:local: pnpm run db:backup:local && python3 scripts/to_sql.py && wrangler d1 execute timetable_icu --file=./scripts/out/sync_courses.sql
scripts.db:sync:local: pnpm run db:scrape && pnpm run db:push:local
scripts.db:push:remote: pnpm run db:backup:remote && python3 scripts/to_sql.py && wrangler d1 execute timetable_icu --file=./scripts/out/sync_courses.sql --remote
scripts.db:sync:remote: pnpm run db:scrape && pnpm run db:push:remote
scripts.db:backup:local: mkdir -p backup && wrangler d1 export timetable_icu --output=./backup/local_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S).sql
scripts.db:backup:remote: mkdir -p backup && wrangler d1 export timetable_icu --remote --output=./backup/remote_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S).sql
scripts.db:migrate:local: pnpm run db:backup:local && wrangler d1 migrations apply timetable_icu
scripts.db:migrate:remote: pnpm run db:backup:remote && wrangler d1 migrations apply timetable_icu --remote
